---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for LifeOS
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe what's missing or frustrating.
e.g. "I can't compare two experiments side-by-side, so it's hard to..."

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Which part of LifeOS does this affect?
- [ ] Experiment creation
- [ ] Daily logging
- [ ] AI analysis / insights
- [ ] Personal Operating Manual
- [ ] Frontend (React/Tailwind)
- [ ] Backend (Node/Express)
- [ ] AI integration (Ollama / OpenAI)
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Mockups, references, or related Future Scope items (e.g. Smartwatch Integration, AI Life Coach, Advanced Analytics Dashboard) this might tie into.
